full_text:
Sample ID: S114_pAdn

Cell count:

total: 11.6 E6

live: 8.6 E6

viability: 73.8 %

size: 10.4 um

Total cell count: 11.05 e6 / ml

! Pre-coat all the wells with omentum-gel:

10 uL for 48-well plates!

A) RNA/DNA extraction + FFPE sample (4 drops):

48-well plate

DNA/RNA + FFPE: 34 wells x 40 µl x = 1700 µl

2000 cells/µl = 3.40E6 cells

→ make 2 x 1.5 ml eppendorfs, 850 µl each

volume to take from cell suspension: 154 uL

cells in medium → 554 uL

ome-gel → 120 µl

aprotinin → 2.6 µl

thrombin → 2.6 µl

fibrinogen → 17 µl

→ Let it solidify for 60 min - add 350 uL medium

B) Drug treatment for flow:

48-well plate

7 conditions x 6 wells/condition = 42 wells

42 wells x 40 µl = 1680 µl,

2000 cells/µl = 4.20E6 cells

→ make 2 x 1.5 ml eppendorfs, 840 µl each

volume to take from cell suspension: 190 uL

cells in medium → 510.2 uL

ome-gel → 118 µl

aprotinin → 2.5 µl

thrombin → 2.5 µl

fibrinogen → 16.8 µl

→ Let it solidify for 60 min - add 300 uL medium

total: 10.5 E6

live: 7.26 E6

viability: 69.1 %

size: 9.9 um

C) Drug treatment for IF:

96-well U plate

7 conditions x 8 wells/condition= 56 wells

56 wells x 8 µl = 448 µl → make 500 µl

2000 cells/µl = 1.00E6 cells

→ make 1 x 1.5 ml eppendorf

volume to take from cell suspension:

cells in medium →

ome-gel → 70.5 µl

aprotinin → 1.5 µl

thrombin → 1.5 µl

fibrinogen → 10 µl

→ Let it solidify for 30 min - add 150 uL medium

D) Sample for Flow - Day 0

→ Collect 3.0E6 cells per 900 uL flow staining buffer

E) Sample for cryo

→ Collect 4 x 11.05 cells per 1 mL stemcell banker

Omegel for the coating:

76 wells x 10 uL = ~800 uL

medium → 667 µl

ome-gel → 113 µl

aprotinin → 2.4 µl

thrombin → 2.4 µl

fibrinogen → 16 µl

Prepare:

Medium

needed 350 uL x 34 = 11.9 mL

42 x 300 uL = 12.6 mL

56 x 150 uL = 8.4 mL

sum ~ 40 mL

Omegel needed ~ 610 uL

aprotinin = 13 uL

thrombin = 13 uL

fibrinogen = 86 uL

Notes from the culturing:

Unlike last time when the pre-coating evenly flattened to the bottom, this time it remained as a high droplet. Hence the 40 uL drop of the omegel + sample did not stay on top of the coating but rather made it to escape on the walls. After pipetting three 40 uL drops for the DNA / RNA plate, it was decided that the volume of the drop needs to be reduced down to 30 uL. Note! S114_pOme drop volume is different.

For the 96-well plate there was no coating done since the height would cause problems for imaging.

Antti Hassinen (FIMM-HCA) said that U clear bottom is optically very good and therefore this is the format used now. For these wells 8 uL seemed too little, so at the end the volume of the drops was raised to 10 uL. Originally the 8 uL was designed for 96 flat bottom plates. IF plan: CD45 / cl-PARP or cl-casp3-7 / CK7.

Days in culture: 6

Drug treatments:

Plate 1

DMSO - control

olaparib 20 uM

olaparib 40 uM

pembrolizumab 10 ug / mL

pembrolizumab 50 ug / mL

ola + pembro 20 + 10

ola + pembro 40 + 50

Plate layout (48-well plate):

Treatment:

Next day, prepare 7x concentrated drug working solution

Add 50 uL of the drug per 300 uL medium on 48 well plate

Add 25 of the drug per 150 uL medium on 96 well plate

For S114_pAdn:

6 x on 48 well plate = 6 x 50 uL = 300 uL

8 x on 96 well plate = 12 x 25 uL = 300 uL

(!) c1v1 = c2v2 -> c1 x 10 uL = c2 x v2

Aprotinin | 10 mg/mL | 33.3 ug/mL | 0.003
Thrombin | 100 U | 0.3 U | 0.003

Control | Drug 1 | Drug 2 | Drug 3 | Drug 4 | Drug 5 | Drug 6 |
